zh.lifeSummary: 當WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE I於大約1298年出生在英國諾福爾可洛登時，他的父親WALTER DE CALTHORPE30歲，母親Ela Stanhowe26歲。他於大約1331年與Isabel Lovell在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1359年在英國諾福爾可巴根斯索普享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE I于大约1298年出生在英国諾福爾可洛登时，他的父亲WALTER DE CALTHORPE30岁，母亲Ela Stanhowe26岁。他于大约1331年与Isabel Lovell在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1359年在英国諾福爾可巴根斯索普享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CALTHORPE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: WILLIAM
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE I was born about 1298, in Loddon, Norfolk, England, his father, WALTER DE CALTHORPE, was 30 and his mother, Ela Stanhowe, was 26. He married Isabel Lovell about 1331, in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1359, in Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England, at the age of 63.

Il a épousé Isabel Lovell environ 1331, à Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1359, à Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

Lui sposato Isabel Lovell circa 1331, nel Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE Iが約1298年にイギリスノーフォルクロッドオンで生まれた時，父WALTER DE CALTHORPEは30歳，母Ela Stanhoweは26歳であった。約1331年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアティトチマーッシュでIsabel Lovellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1359年にイギリスノーフォルクバコンスソルペで63歳で死去した。

ko.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: 영국 노르폴크 웰스 니스트 테 시
ko.lifeSummary: WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE I(이)가 대략 1298년 영국 노르폴크 로던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 WALTER DE CALTHORPE(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Ela Stanhowe(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1331년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 티트ch마시에서 Isabel Lovell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1359년 영국 노르폴크 바콘스소에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Isabel Lovell aproximadamente 1331, em Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: веллс некст т сеа, норфолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE I родился около 1298 г. в местности лоддон, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени WALTER DE CALTHORPE было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ela Stanhowe, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Lovell около 1331 г. в местности тичмарш, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1359 г. в местности бакунстаурп, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.
